 On Fri, 15 Aug 2008 16:39:04 -0400 (EDT)
 Greg Larkin <glarkin@freebsd.org> wrote:
 
 > >Synopsis:	Request repocopy of graphics/GraphicsMagick to
 > >graphics/GraphicsMagick12
 >     GraphicsMagick 1.2.x is the current stable release, and it is not
 >     API-compatible with 1.1.x. I would like a repocopy from
 >     graphics/GraphicsMagick to graphics/GraphicsMagick12 so both
 >     release branches can be maintained in the ports tree and to
 >     encourage dependent applications to upgrade to GraphicsMagick
 > 1.2.x.
 
 OK by me.
